subject: Anime humanoid figure in yellow-and-black outfit with headset, one arm raised, fireworks or light-burst effects in background — Kagamine Len 'Starmine' module from Project DIVA
description: A young anime-style figure with short hair and a headset stands in a lively pose with one arm raised upward. The outfit is predominantly yellow and black, with a scarf-like accessory at the neck. The background is filled with radiant blue-white burst effects suggesting fireworks or stage lighting, giving the scene an energetic, celebratory feel. The figure's expression reads as bright and upward-looking. Card frame elements (Weiss Schwarz) surround the image.
foreground: Anime figure in yellow-black outfit with headset, arm raised
background: Radiant light-burst and fireworks effects in blue and white
emotion: bright, celebratory, uplifted — arm raised in performance or triumph
